info.title: eduxept-api-v1
info.description:
Eduxept API v1 provides authenticated endpoints for portfolio data, strategy planning and file operations.

API docs default style : docs

API docs redoc style : redoc

API docs scalar style : scalar

put.description: Update an existing user record using optimistic locking: submit the record with the unchanged updated_at from the last read. If another client has modified the record in the meantime, the timestamps differ and the update is rejected - re-read the record and retry with the fresh updated_at.

200.description: The updated user record with its refreshed updated_at timestamp, which must be sent back with the next update.

post.description: Returns the full strategy hierarchy (project → visions → missions → focuses → actions) as a nested JSON structure. The `where` clause filters which projects are returned, while `limit`/`offset` paginate the project level. Requires the READ scope.

200.description: Nested strategy view with matching rows, page count, and total project count

get.description: Return the categorical enumerations used across the strategy domain, each member listed with its stored `value` and its per-language labels (`de`, `fr`, `it`, `en`). Covers the implementation state (`implementation_state_type`), the validity state (`validity_state_type`) and the priority state (`priority_state_type`). Intended to populate dropdowns and labels in the UI. The payload is static per deployment and cached process-wide. Read-only; requires the READ scope.

200.description: A StrategiesEnum object holding one list per enum type; each entry is an EnumTranslation with `value` plus the `de`/`fr`/`it`/`en` labels.
response

post.description: Create a new project record in the skills schema. The `tsl_language` field selects the master language for any submitted `tsl_*_txt` translation text; the response resolves those text fields in the same language. Supported language values are `de`, `fr`, `it`, and `en`.

200.description: The newly created project, including its assigned primary key and timestamps.

post.description: Read project records matching the query filter, with optional pagination. The `query.language` value selects which translation column is resolved into each `tsl_*_txt` field in the response; default is `de`.

200.description: A paginated collection of project records matching the query.

put.description: Update an existing project record using optimistic locking: submit the record with the unchanged updated_at from the last read. If another client has modified the record in the meantime, the timestamps differ and 422 is returned - re-read the record and retry with the fresh updated_at. The `tsl_language` field selects which resolved `tsl_*_txt` values are returned and must match the translation master language when changing translated text. Translated text in `final` state cannot be changed.

200.description: The updated project record with its refreshed updated_at timestamp, which must be sent back with the next update.

delete.description: Delete an existing project record by primary key. Translation text language is not resolved or modified during deletion; the primary key identifies the project to delete.

200.description: Empty response on successful deletion.
